title: T Level technical qualification withdrawal criteria
body: " This guidance has been transferred from the previous skills body the Institute for Apprenticeships and Technical Education (IfATE) following its closure on 31 May 2025. The guidance is under review and may be subject to change.   This document explains what Skills England consider when deciding whether to withdraw approval of a T Level Technical Qualification (T Level TQ).  The document explains the:   withdrawal criteria for T Level TQ  process for deciding whether to withdraw approval withdrawal outside of the change process how T Level TQs are withdrawn   "
